# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Branch Safety

- [ ] This branch was created from `staging`.
- [ ] This PR does not target `main` unless it is a production promotion from `staging`.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.

## Checks

- [ ] Backend tests/lint run or not applicable.
- [ ] Frontend build/typecheck run or not applicable.
- [ ] Migration risk reviewed or not applicable.
- [ ] Secrets and generated files checked.

## Product/Architecture Impact

- [ ] Multi-tenant safety considered.
- [ ] Cost/usage impact considered.
- [ ] AI traceability considered if AI is involved.
- [ ] Snapshot/reproducibility considered if reports or dashboards are involved.
